1099-r:box1.label: Gross distribution
1099-r:box1.so: Tani waa wadarta guud ee lacagta laga bixiyay xisaabtaada hawlgabka (retirement) ama qorshahaaga lacagta, ka hor inta aan canshuur laga jarin.
1099-r:box1.en: This is the total amount paid out from your retirement plan or pension this year, before any tax was taken out.

1099-r:box2a.label: Taxable amount
1099-r:box2a.so: Tani waa qaybta lacagtaas ah ee canshuur lagu xisaabin doono.
1099-r:box2a.en: This is the part of that money the government will count when figuring out your taxes.

1099-r:box2b.label: Checkboxes
1099-r:box2b.so: Sanduuqani waxay tilmaamaysaa haddii qiimaha la canshuuro aan la go'aamin, ama haddii tani tahay lacag-bixin dhammaystiran.
1099-r:box2b.en: These checkboxes flag whether the taxable amount couldn't be determined, or whether this was a total distribution.

1099-r:box3.label: Capital gain
1099-r:box3.so: Tani waa qaybta lacagta ah ee loo xisaabiyo faa'iidada raasamaalka, oo heshay xeerar canshuur ka duwan kuwa caadiga ah.
1099-r:box3.en: This is the portion treated as a capital gain, which can get different tax treatment than regular income.

1099-r:box4.label: Federal income tax withheld
1099-r:box4.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta federaalka ah ee horay laga jaray lacagtan, oo dawladda federaalka loo diray.
1099-r:box4.en: This is the federal tax that was already taken out of this payment and sent to the government.

1099-r:box5.label: Employee contributions
1099-r:box5.so: Tani waa qaybtii lacagta aad aadnaa ka gelin qorshahaaga hawlgabka, oo aadan u baahnayn inaad mar kale canshuur ka bixiso.
1099-r:box5.en: This is the part of the payout that's your own contributions you already put in — you usually don't pay tax on this part again.

1099-r:box7.label: Distribution code
1099-r:box7.so: Tani waa koodh yar oo sharaxaya nooca lacag-bixintan, tusaale ahaan haddii ay tahay hawlgab caadi ah ama mid hore. Koodhkan kaliya wuxuu kuu sheegayaa nooca — ma uusan macno gaar ah u qabin lacag-bixinta.
1099-r:box7.en: This is a short code explaining what kind of payout this was, like a normal retirement payout or an early one. It just labels the type — it doesn't change the amount.

1099-r:box14.label: State tax withheld
1099-r:box14.so: Tani waa canshuurta stateka ee horay laga jaray lacag-bixintan.
1099-r:box14.en: This is any state tax that was already withheld from this distribution.

1099-r:box16.label: State distribution
1099-r:box16.so: Tani waa qaybta lacag-bixinta ee stateku canshuuro.
1099-r:box16.en: This is the portion of the distribution your state taxes.
